name: qx8_statemem3
drl:
query BAll()
    $b : B(k != -999999)
end

rule QR0 salience 10
when
    $a : A()
    ?BAll()
then
    insert(new Out(1));
end

rule R0 salience 5
when
    T(t == 0)
then
    insert(new B(30));
    insert(new B(40));
    insert(new A(2));
end

rule R1
when
    T(t == 0)
then
    insert(new B(50));
end
